title: Junior SEO Specialist at Dove India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Dove India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Dove India in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
